rule_context.rule: spread_abs >= 15 AND player on favored side — PTS T25 hard skip regardless of elite scorer status or iron_floor
spread_abs >= 19 — hard skip all 3PM for favored team regardless of trend direction
rule_context.note: Extreme blowout skip fires (spread_abs=20.5 >= 19) even though trend=up

rule_context.rule: REB T8 ceiling rule: only select if 7+/10 at this tier; 7/10=70% meets floor but VOLATILE tag + trend=down + blowout context (65% blowout hit rate) and 78% minimum confidence floor — after VOLATILE -5% and blowout context, confidence falls below 78% minimum
spread_abs >= 19 — hard skip all 3PM for favored team regardless of trend direction

VOLATILE + 3PM: even at T4 (iron_floor present), underlying vs_soft=59% and competitive=59% fail T4 at 70% threshold. Step to T2/T1: but iron_floor+VOLATILE interaction — iron_floor protects tier but vs_soft/competitive rates at T4 are 59% (below 70%). No valid T4 pick. T2: no explicit data but vs_soft=59% at T4 suggests T2 would qualify. However 3PM VOLATILE + iron_floor: step-down required. T2→check: no T2 hit rate provided in quant; T1→iron_floor present. 3PM hard skip does not fire (trend=up, no blowout). T1 with iron_floor: 80%+ possible but vs_soft=59% at T4 suggests low overall 3PM volume. Skipping T4. T1 viable but confidence marginal given competitive split at T4 only 59%. Proceeding to note: T1 iron_floor pick viable but skipped here due to volatile_weak_combo concern at any tier above T1, and T1 itself not having explicit hit rate data shown — cannot confirm ≥70%.
rule_context.note: Skipping T4 due to vs_soft=59% competitive=59% failing 70% threshold; T1 lacks explicit hit rate data in quant stats — cannot confirm qualifying hit rate

rule_context.rule: AST T4+ hard gate: PF position → opp_today must be soft. opp_today=soft ✓ — gate passes on defense. BUT overall=70% at T4; VOLATILE tag present. After VOLATILE -5% → 65% — below 70% floor. SKIP.

3PM trend=down mandatory step-down: T1 is minimum tier — after step-down from T1, no valid tier remains. But also: competitive=58% at T1 (below 75% 3PM floor). Additionally VOLATILE -5% on a 75% baseline → 70% before step-down → 65% after step-down. Below 75% 3PM minimum floor. SKIP.
rule_context.note: trend=down step-down from T1 leaves no valid tier; also competitive=58% fails 75% 3PM confidence floor

rule_context.rule: FG_MARGIN_THIN:5% fires → drop from T25 to T20. T20: VOLATILE + 8/10 at T15+ → volatile_weak_combo fires. No T20 hit rate explicitly shown; T25 overall=80%(8/10). After step to T20: VOLATILE + high tier → check volatile_weak_combo: if T20 hit rate is 7/10 or 8/10 → SKIP. Without explicit T20 data, conservative: VOLATILE at T20 with thin margin → skip PTS prop per fg_margin_thin_tier_step cascade.

Reaves is QUES — per injury exclusion rules, QUES players may play. However Reaves 3PM: overall=90%, trend=stable, no iron_floor on 3PM. 3PM confidence ceiling: non-iron-floor → cap 80%. Meets 75% 3PM floor. This is NOT a hard skip. Reversing this skip — Reaves 3PM T1 qualifies but at 80% cap with QUES -5% → 75%. Emitting as pick instead.
